aaa

  • The Ultimate Guide to First-Principles Thinking

agile

  • basecamp Shape Up by Ryan Singer - Basecamp
  • Life Cycle of a Silver Bullet by Sarah A. Sheard
  • estimation From Nobel Prize to Project Management Getting Risks Right by Bent Flyvbjerg, Ph.D. & Dr. Techn.
  • spotify squad Spotify’s Failed \#SquadGoals by Jereiah Lee

career

  • 10 Questions I Wish I’d Asked More To Turbocharge My Career by Julie Zhuo
  • interview 10 Impressive Questions to Ask in a Job Interview by Alison Green, The Cut

games

  • AC-Origins Assassin Creed Origins
  • Civilization V

learn

  • guitar Fender Play Guitar

manage

  • 1o1 Easy check-in questions for your 1:1s by Lara Hogan
  • playbook Heuristics for Effective Management by Kamil Sindi @ksindi
  • 1o1 Get To Know your Team by Claire Lew
  • 1o1 Questions for our first 1:1 by Lara hogan
  • coach The Coaching Habit. Say Less, Ask More & Change the Way You Lead Forever by Michael Bungay Stanier

mba

  • Managing Humans - Biting and Humorous Tales of a Software Engineering Manager by Michael Lopp
  • Accelerate - The Science of Lean Software and DevOps - Building and Scaling High Performing Technology Organizations by Nicole Forsgren PhD, Jez Humble, and Gene Kim
  • Creativity, Inc. Overcoming the Unseen Forces That Stand in the Way of True Inspiration by Ed Catmul and Amy Wallace
  • hiring gender paper Gendered Wording in Job Ads
  • economics How The Economic Machine Works by Ray Dalio
  • Linchpin - Are You Indispensable? by Seth Godin

philosophy

  • Enlightenment Now - The Case for Reason, Science, Humanism, and Progress by Steven Pinker
  • Sapiens A Brief History of Humankind by Yuval Noah Harari
  • 9 Lessons for Life by Tim Minchin

programming

  • python web scraping Python Web Scraping Using BeautifulSoup by dataquest.io

tech

  • hashi devops consul Learn Consul

  • hashi devops vault Learn Vault
